diffs.diff:
--- a/explore_metricgan.py
+++ b/explore_metricgan.py
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+import torch

+import numpy as np

+from speechbrain.inference.enhancement import SpectralMaskEnhancement

+

+print('Loading MetricGAN+ model...')

+model = SpectralMaskEnhancement.from_hparams(

+    source='speechbrain/metricgan-plus-voicebank',

+    savedir='/opt/pretrained_models/metricgan-plus-voicebank'

+)

+

+print('\n=== Model type ===')

+print(type(model))

+

+print('\n=== Named children ===')

+for name, child in model.named_children():

+    print(f'  {name}: {type(child).__name__}')

+

+print('\n=== All attributes ===')

+for attr in dir(model):

+    if not attr.startswith('_') and not callable(getattr(model, attr)):

+        val = getattr(model, attr)

+        if isinstance(val, torch.nn.Module):

+            total_params = sum(p.numel() for p in val.parameters())

+            print(f'  {attr}: {type(val).__name__} ({total_params:,} params)')

+        elif not isinstance(val, (dict, list)):

+            print(f'  {attr}: {type(val).__name__} = {val}')

+

+# Look for enhance_model specifically

+if hasattr(model, 'enhance_model'):

+    em = model.enhance_model

+    print(f'\n=== enhance_model found! ===')

+    print(f'Type: {type(em)}')

+    total_params = sum(p.numel() for p in em.parameters())

+    print(f'Total parameters: {total_params:,}')

+    print('\nEnhance model structure:')

+    print(em)

+    print('\nNamed parameters:')

+    for name, param in em.named_parameters():

+        print(f'  {name}: {param.shape} trainable={param.requires_grad}')

+

+# Check hparams for model config

+if hasattr(model, 'hparams'):

+    print('\n=== Key hparams ===')

+    for key in ['N_FFT', 'hop_length', 'n_fft', 'sample_rate', 'n_mels', 'mask_type']:

+        if hasattr(model.hparams, key):

+            print(f'  {key}: {getattr(model.hparams, key)}')

+

+# Try to understand the forward pass

+print('\n=== Testing forward pass ===')

+import soundfile as sf

+noisy_path = '/data/noisy/p232_001.wav'

+noisy, sr = sf.read(noisy_path)

+noisy_t = torch.FloatTensor(noisy).unsqueeze(0)

+print(f'Input shape: {noisy_t.shape}')

+

+# Try direct enhancement

+enhanced = model.enhance_file(noisy_path)

+if isinstance(enhanced, torch.Tensor):

+    print(f'Enhanced shape: {enhanced.shape}')

+elif isinstance(enhanced, np.ndarray):

+    print(f'Enhanced shape: {enhanced.shape}')

+

+# Try to access STFT processing

+if hasattr(model, 'compute_stft'):

+    print('\nModel has compute_stft')

+if hasattr(model, 'compute_istft'):

+    print('Model has compute_istft')

+

+print('\n=== Looking for generator/discriminator modules ===')

+for name, module in model.named_modules():

+    if any(kw in name.lower() for kw in ['generat', 'discrimin', 'enhance', 'mask_net', 'se_model']):

+        total_params = sum(p.numel() for p in module.parameters())

+        print(f'  {name}: {type(module).__name__} ({total_params:,} params)')
